blocks.text: This slice moves the first concrete provider adapter.

items: Public CI for command construction, blocked protocol args, executable detection, stream-json parsing, raw event translation, golden fixtures, and input approval frames

blocks.text: The package owns only the daemon-side C4 adapter ACL for the external Claude Code CLI. It must not bundle, install, or distribute Claude.
Real CLI integration is opt-in with `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1`; public CI stays deterministic and skips real CLI checks when the external CLI is absent.
